authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

reaches.name: Crowley Lake within 1,800 feet of the outlet dam
reaches.fromDesc: buoy line 1,800 feet from the outlet (Long Valley) dam

reaches.name: Crowley Lake, except the closed area near the outlet dam
reaches.fromDesc: buoy line 1,800 feet from the outlet dam

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(38) — Crowley Lake (Mono Co.)
sources.quotedText: (38) Crowley Lake (Mono Co.). (See individual listings for regulations on tributary waters which include: Convict, Crooked, Hilton, Hot, McGee, and Whiskey creeks and the upper Owens River). (A) Crowley Lake within 1,800 feet of the outlet dam (this area is marked with a series of buoys). Closed to all fishing all year for safety purposes. (B) Crowley Lake, except for the closed area near the outlet dam (see above). Last Sat. in Apr. through Jul. 31. 5 trout Aug. 1 through Nov. 15. Only artificial lures may be used. Minimum size limit: 18 inches total length. 2 trout

sources.title: Frequently Asked Fishing Questions | Mono County
CCR T14 §5.85 — Trout (statewide daily bag and possession limits)
sources.quotedText: daily bag and possession limits mean the total number of trout in combination

sources.title: California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon | CDFW
sources.quotedText: RELEASE WATER: Crowley Lake — SPECIES: Brown Trout, RELEASE SIZE: Sub-catchable, RELEASE PROGRAM: Put and Grow, RELEASE MONTH RANGE: August-November | SPECIES: Lahontan Cutthroat Trout, RELEASE SIZE: Sub-catchable, RELEASE PROGRAM: Put and Grow, RELEASE MONTH RANGE: August-November | SPECIES: Rainbow Trout, RELEASE SIZE: Sub-catchable, RELEASE PROGRAM: Put and Grow, RELEASE MONTH RANGE: August-November. Sub-catchable: approximate 5"-7". Put and Grow (fingerling and sub-catchable) - fish are planted into productive habitats that provide natural growth to achieve catchable sizes in following years. The Department's execution of these plans is not guaranteed.

parameters.note: Closed to all fishing all year for safety purposes; area is marked with a series of buoys within 1,800 feet of the outlet dam.

regulations.humanSummary: Closed to all fishing all year within 1,800 feet of the outlet dam (buoy-marked, safety closure)
regulations.verbatimText: Crowley Lake within 1,800 feet of the outlet dam (this area is marked with a series of buoys). Closed to all fishing all year for safety purposes.

regulations.humanSummary: Open last Saturday in April through July 31 (general season), and August 1 through November 15 (artificial-lure-only period), on the main body of the lake outside the outlet-dam safety closure
regulations.verbatimText: Last Sat. in Apr. through Jul. 31. ... Aug. 1 through Nov. 15. Only artificial lures may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: Applies during the general season, last Saturday in April through July 31. Possession limit of 10 is the statewide default (twice the daily bag) per CCR §5.85, since Crowley Lake's own listing states only the 5-trout daily bag.

regulations.humanSummary: 5 trout daily bag, last Saturday in April through July 31
regulations.verbatimText: Last Sat. in Apr. through Jul. 31. 5 trout

parameters.counting_rule: Applies during the fall artificial-lure-only period, August 1 through November 15. Possession limit of 4 is the statewide default (twice the daily bag) per CCR §5.85, since Crowley Lake's own listing states only the 2-trout daily bag.

regulations.humanSummary: 2 trout daily bag, August 1 through November 15 (minimum 18-inch fish, artificial lures only)
regulations.verbatimText: Aug. 1 through Nov. 15. Only artificial lures may be used. Minimum size limit: 18 inches total length. 2 trout

parameters.note: Applies only during the August 1 through November 15 period.

regulations.humanSummary: 18-inch minimum total length, August 1 through November 15
regulations.verbatimText: Minimum size limit: 18 inches total length.

parameters.note: Applies only during the August 1 through November 15 period; bait and natural bait are prohibited.

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures may be used, August 1 through November 15
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures may be used.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

stockingSchedule.note: CDFW's 2026 Provisional Stocking Document lists Crowley Lake as receiving Sub-catchable (approx. 5-7 in) Brown Trout under the Put and Grow program, release month range August-November. This is a provisional plan; CDFW's execution is not guaranteed.

CDFW's 2026 Provisional Stocking Document lists Crowley Lake as receiving Sub-catchable (approx. 5-7 in) Lahontan Cutthroat Trout under the Put and Grow program, release month range August-November. This is a provisional plan; CDFW's execution is not guaranteed.

CDFW's 2026 Provisional Stocking Document lists Crowley Lake as receiving Sub-catchable (approx. 5-7 in) Rainbow Trout under the Put and Grow program, release month range August-November. This is a provisional plan; CDFW's execution is not guaranteed.
